articles.title: Italy Will Buy Six Airbus A330 MRRTs In $1.6B-Value Deal
articles.summary: On May 19th, it was reported by the Italian Ministry of Defense that it had awarded a contract to Airbus for the planned procurement of a fleet of six A330 multi-role tanker transport aircraft, as part of a deal valued at €1.4 billion ($1.6 billion).
